name: granola
description: Fetch meetings from Granola and save to vault. Two modes: 'api' (paid Granola API key) or 'scrape' (no key — reads the local Granola cache; UNSTABLE, may break on Granola updates).

mode.default: api if GRANOLA_API_KEY is set, otherwise scrape

secrets.description: Granola API key (grn_...). Required only for 'api' mode (paid plans). Leave unset to use 'scrape' mode.

env.description: Override the local cache path used by scrape mode. Defaults to ~/Library/Application Support/Granola/cache-v6.json.enc

tools.name: get_meeting
tools.description: Get meeting details with summary and transcript

tools.name: save_call
tools.description: Save a meeting (summary + transcript) to vault

tools.name: list_saved_calls
tools.description: List meeting IDs already saved in vault
